name: Hot and Spicy Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomato sauce, red pepper flakes, hot sauce, garlic powder, onion powder, and Jalapeno peppers in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Spray a baking sheet with no-stick cooking spray.
3. Place chicken wings on the baking dish.
4. Brush sauce over the wings.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
6. Turn the wings over and brush with sauce.
7. Bake for another 10 minutes.
8. Serve with blue cheese dressing and celery if desired.
9. Serves 4.
